zh.lifeSummary: 當Angharad ferch Maredudd於大約0982年出生在威爾士卡馬特史爾丁萊 卡素時，她的父親Maredydd Ap Owain46歲，母親Asritha Verch Llandilo40歲。她於1023年與Cynfyn ap Gwerystan of Powys結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1058年5月8日在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾卡素享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Angharad ferch Maredudd于大约0982年出生在威尔士卡馬特史爾丁萊 卡素时，她的父亲Maredydd Ap Owain46岁，母亲Asritha Verch Llandilo40岁。她于1023年与Cynfyn ap Gwerystan of Powys结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1058年5月8日在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾卡素享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Angharad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old Celtic intensive prefix an- + cār ‘love’ + the noun suffix -ad. This was the name of the mother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’). In the Mabinogi, Angharad Golden Hand at first rejects Peredur's suit, but later falls in love with him when he comes back as the unknown Mute Knight. The name has been strongly revived in Wales since the 1940s, borne, for example, by the actress Angharad Rees ( 1949-2012 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Angharad ferch Maredudd was born about 0982, in Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales, her father, Maredydd Ap Owain, was 46 and her mother, Asritha Verch Llandilo, was 40. She married Cynfyn ap Gwerystan of Powys in 1023. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 8 May 1058, in Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Angharad ferch Maredudd est née environ 0982, à Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Galles, son père, Maredydd Ap Owain, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Asritha Verch Llandilo, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Cynfyn ap Gwerystan of Powys en 1023. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 8 mai 1058, à Castle, Montgomeryshire, Galles, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Angharad ferch Maredudd um 0982 in Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Maredydd Ap Owain 46 und ihre Mutter Asritha Verch Llandilo 40. Sie hat 1023 Cynfyn ap Gwerystan of Powys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 8. Mai 1058 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Angharad ferch Maredudd è nata il circa 0982 nel Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Galles, sua padre, Maredydd Ap Owain, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Asritha Verch Llandilo, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Cynfyn ap Gwerystan of Powys nel 1023. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 8 maggio 1058, nel Castle, Montgomeryshire, Galles, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Angharad ferch Mareduddが約0982年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアディンエフウル カストルで生まれた時，父Maredydd Ap Owainは46歳，母Asritha Verch Llandiloは40歳であった。1023年にCynfyn ap Gwerystan of Powysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1058年5月8日にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアカストルで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Angharad ferch Maredudd(이)가 대략 0982년 웨일스 카마테실르 딘프르 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Maredydd Ap Owain(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Asritha Verch Llandilo(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1023년 Cynfyn ap Gwerystan of Powys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1058년 5월 8일 웨일스 몽고머이실르 카스틀에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom: Gwynedd, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Angharad ferch Maredudd nasceu aproximadamente 0982, em Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Gales, seu pai, Maredydd Ap Owain, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Asritha Verch Llandilo, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Cynfyn ap Gwerystan of Powys em 1023. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 8 de maio de 1058, em Castle, Montgomeryshire, Gales, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Angharad ferch Maredudd родилась около 0982 г. в местности даинофр кастл, кармартеншир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Maredydd Ap Owain было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Asritha Verch Llandilo, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Cynfyn ap Gwerystan of Powys в 1023 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 8 мая 1058 г. в местности кастл, монтгомиришир, Уэльс в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Angharad ferch Maredudd nació aproximadamente 0982, en Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Gales, su papá, Maredydd Ap Owain, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Asritha Verch Llandilo, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Cynfyn ap Gwerystan of Powys en 1023. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 8 de mayo de 1058, en Castle, Montgomeryshire, Gales, a la edad de 77 años.
